ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the video game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the promotional image of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platforms the game is available on */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating out of 5 */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the game */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Parent genre ID (for sub-genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_genres" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Whether the user is a premium member */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the game (out of 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gameplays" (
  "gameplay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gameplay session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user playing the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the gameplay session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the gameplay session */,
  "playtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Total playtime in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gameplay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gameplays_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gameplays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the achievement belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for completing the achievement */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the achievement's icon */,
  "is_secret" INTEGER /* Whether the achievement is secret (not publicly visible) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_achievements" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date when the user earned the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to redeem the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g. game discount, exclusive skin) */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date when the reward expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendships" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  "friendship_date" TEXT /* Date when the friendship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "friend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_recommendations" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended game */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was recommended */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g. genre, gameplay style) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "game_id")
)
